headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://lh3.googleusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; worker-src blob: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
